title: Active Threat — Armed Individual
description: Reports of an individual with a bladed weapon in Terminal 2. Multiple passengers are fleeing the area. The individual is moving toward the airside gates.

event.details: Caller screaming — reports a man with a knife attacking passengers near T2 boarding gates
Mass crowd flight detected — people running in all directions away from Gate B4 area
Airside access door forced — individual may be attempting to enter airside zone
CCTV visual of individual with weapon confirmed — other persons down on floor

optimal_response.primary_action: activate Level 5 protocol — notify APD, SPF, and STF immediately. Lockdown T2 Gate B4.
optimal_response.secondary_action: direct civilians to shelter in place or evacuate away from threat — CCTV operator to track movement
optimal_response.do_not: Do not engage armed individual unless trained tactical officer with authorization. No open radio broadcast of threat details.
optimal_response.escalation: If casualties confirmed, activate Mass Casualty protocol — SCDF and TTAMC. If explosives suspected, BDU simultaneously.
